---
title: "Conservation and Intron Retention Analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.width = 16, fig.height = 12)
```

```{r load-libraries}
library(data.table)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(broom)
library(gridExtra)
library(pheatmap)
library(viridis)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)
```

## Load Data

```{r load-data}
# Load SpliceAI v3.1 data
spliceai_data <- fread("../results/splice_out_v3.1/all_spliceai_scores_v3.1.tsv", sep = "\t", header = TRUE)

# Load phyloP decoy data v3 (merged from decoysv3)
phylop_decoy_v3 <- fread("../results/phyloP/decoysv3/phyloP_decoy_v3_merged.tsv")
# Rename MAF_file to decoyID for consistency
setnames(phylop_decoy_v3, "MAF_file", "decoyID")

# Load PSI table
PSI_table <- fread("../reference/PSI_TABLE-hg38.tab.gz")

# Load decoy coordinates from v3 BED file
decoy_coords <- fread("../data/DecoysInConservedGenes50thpercentilev3.bed",
  col.names = c("chr", "start", "end", "decoyID", "score", "strand")
)

cat("Data loaded:\n")
cat("  SpliceAI v3.1 rows:", nrow(spliceai_data), "\n")
cat("  phyloP v3 rows:", nrow(phylop_decoy_v3), "\n")
cat("  PSI table rows:", nrow(PSI_table), "\n")
cat("  Decoy coordinates:", nrow(decoy_coords), "\n")
```

## Parse SpliceAI Data

```{r parse-spliceai}
# Function to parse [max1][pos1][max2][pos2][d] format (v3.1)
parse_score_format <- function(value) {
  # Match pattern: [number][number][number][number][number]
  match_result <- str_match(value, "\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]\\[(\\d+)\\]\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]\\[(\\d+)\\]\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]")
  if (is.na(match_result[1])) {
    return(list(max1 = NA, pos1 = NA, max2 = NA, pos2 = NA, d = NA))
  }
  return(list(
    max1 = as.numeric(match_result[2]),
    pos1 = as.integer(match_result[3]),
    max2 = as.numeric(match_result[4]),
    pos2 = as.integer(match_result[5]),
    d = as.numeric(match_result[6])
  ))
}

# Extract decoy IDs
decoy_ids <- spliceai_data$decoyID

# Get species columns (all except decoyID)
species_cols <- setdiff(names(spliceai_data), "decoyID")

# Parse all data into long format
parsed_data_list <- list()

for (species in species_cols) {
  parsed_scores <- lapply(spliceai_data[[species]], parse_score_format)

  # Convert to data.table
  species_data <- data.table(
    decoyID = decoy_ids,
    species = species,
    max1 = sapply(parsed_scores, function(x) x$max1),
    pos1 = sapply(parsed_scores, function(x) x$pos1),
    max2 = sapply(parsed_scores, function(x) x$max2),
    pos2 = sapply(parsed_scores, function(x) x$pos2),
    d = sapply(parsed_scores, function(x) x$d)
  )

  parsed_data_list[[species]] <- species_data
}

# Combine all species data
all_data <- rbindlist(parsed_data_list)

# Filter out -1 values for analysis
all_data_valid <- all_data[max1 != -1.0 & pos1 != -1 & max2 != -1.0 & pos2 != -1]
```

## Filter PSI Table

```{r filter-psi}
# Filter to only rows where EVENT starts with "HsaIN"
PSI_table <- PSI_table[grepl("^HsaIN", EVENT), ]

# Remove quality control columns ending in "-Q"
q_cols <- grep("-Q$", colnames(PSI_table), value = TRUE)
if (length(q_cols) > 0) {
  PSI_table[, (q_cols) := NULL]
}

# Identify PSI value columns (exclude metadata columns)
metadata_cols <- c("GENE", "EVENT", "COORD", "LENGTH", "FullCO", "COMPLEX")
psi_cols <- setdiff(colnames(PSI_table), metadata_cols)

# Remove rows where >80% of PSI values are NA
na_threshold <- 0.8
if (length(psi_cols) > 0 && nrow(PSI_table) > 0) {
  row_na_prop <- rowSums(is.na(PSI_table[, ..psi_cols])) / length(psi_cols)
  PSI_table <- PSI_table[row_na_prop <= na_threshold, ]
} else {
  stop("No PSI value columns found or table is empty")
}

# Remove columns where >80% of PSI values are NA
if (nrow(PSI_table) > 0 && length(psi_cols) > 0) {
  col_na_prop <- colSums(is.na(PSI_table[, ..psi_cols])) / nrow(PSI_table)
  cols_to_keep <- names(col_na_prop[col_na_prop <= na_threshold])
  psi_cols_filtered <- c(metadata_cols, cols_to_keep)
  PSI_table <- PSI_table[, ..psi_cols_filtered]
}

# Create filtered version
PSI_table_filtered <- PSI_table
rm(PSI_table)
gc()

cat("Final PSI table dimensions:", nrow(PSI_table_filtered), "rows x", ncol(PSI_table_filtered), "columns\n")
```

## Extract Intron Coordinates from PSI Table

```{r extract-intron-coords}
# Parse COORD column to extract chromosome, start, and end
parse_coord <- function(coord_str) {
  # Extract chromosome and coordinates
  parts <- strsplit(coord_str, ":")[[1]]
  if (length(parts) == 2) {
    chr <- parts[1]
    coords <- strsplit(parts[2], "-")[[1]]
    if (length(coords) == 2) {
      start <- as.numeric(coords[1])
      end <- as.numeric(coords[2])
      return(data.frame(chr = chr, start = start, end = end))
    }
  }
  return(data.frame(chr = NA, start = NA, end = NA))
}

# Apply parsing to all rows
intron_coords <- do.call(rbind, lapply(PSI_table_filtered$COORD, parse_coord))
PSI_table_filtered <- cbind(PSI_table_filtered, intron_coords)

# Create GRanges object for introns
intron_gr <- GRanges(
  seqnames = PSI_table_filtered$chr,
  ranges = IRanges(start = PSI_table_filtered$start, end = PSI_table_filtered$end),
  EVENT = PSI_table_filtered$EVENT,
  GENE = PSI_table_filtered$GENE
)
```

## Overlap Decoy Sites with Introns

```{r overlap-decoys-introns}
# Create GRanges for decoy sites from v3 BED file
decoy_gr_sites <- GRanges(
  seqnames = decoy_coords$chr,
  ranges = IRanges(
    start = decoy_coords$start,
    end = decoy_coords$end
  ),
  decoyID = decoy_coords$decoyID,
  strand = decoy_coords$strand,
  score = decoy_coords$score
)

# Find overlaps between decoy sites and introns
overlaps_decoy_intron <- findOverlaps(decoy_gr_sites, intron_gr, ignore.strand = TRUE)

# Get the full intron coordinates for each decoy
decoy_intron_matched <- data.frame(
  decoyID = decoy_gr_sites$decoyID[queryHits(overlaps_decoy_intron)],
  decoy_chr = seqnames(decoy_gr_sites)[queryHits(overlaps_decoy_intron)],
  decoy_start = start(decoy_gr_sites)[queryHits(overlaps_decoy_intron)],
  decoy_end = end(decoy_gr_sites)[queryHits(overlaps_decoy_intron)],
  decoy_strand = strand(decoy_gr_sites)[queryHits(overlaps_decoy_intron)],
  score = decoy_gr_sites$score[queryHits(overlaps_decoy_intron)],
  intron_chr = seqnames(intron_gr)[subjectHits(overlaps_decoy_intron)],
  intron_start = start(intron_gr)[subjectHits(overlaps_decoy_intron)],
  intron_end = end(intron_gr)[subjectHits(overlaps_decoy_intron)],
  EVENT = intron_gr$EVENT[subjectHits(overlaps_decoy_intron)]
)

# Calculate intron length
decoy_intron_matched$intron_length <- decoy_intron_matched$intron_end - decoy_intron_matched$intron_start

cat("Decoy sites overlapping introns (before filtering):", nrow(decoy_intron_matched), "\n")
cat("Unique decoys with intron overlaps (before filtering):", length(unique(decoy_intron_matched$decoyID)), "\n")

# If a decoy overlaps multiple introns, select the one with the shortest length
decoy_intron_matched <- decoy_intron_matched %>%
  arrange(decoyID, intron_length) %>% # Sort by decoyID, then by intron length (shortest first)
  distinct(decoyID, .keep_all = TRUE) # Keep only the first match (shortest intron) for each decoy
```

## SpliceAI Heatmaps

```{r spliceai-heatmaps-setup}
# Load species order and mapping
species_order_file <- fread("../data/Newickspeciesorder.txt", header = FALSE, col.names = "tree_name")
species_mapping <- fread("../results/tree_to_clade_mapping.tsv", sep = "\t", header = TRUE)
ordered_species <- merge(species_order_file, species_mapping, by = "tree_name", all.x = TRUE, sort = FALSE)
ordered_species_ids <- ordered_species$species_id[!is.na(ordered_species$species_id)]

# Map species IDs to common names
species_id_to_common <- setNames(species_mapping$matched_common_name, species_mapping$species_id)

# Prepare max2 matrix for heatmap
max2_matrix_data <- all_data_valid %>%
  filter(!is.na(max2)) %>%
  select(decoyID, species, max2) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = decoyID, values_from = max2)

max2_matrix <- as.matrix(max2_matrix_data[, -1])
rownames(max2_matrix) <- max2_matrix_data$species
max2_matrix[is.na(max2_matrix)] <- -1

# Reorder rows to match Newick order
available_species <- rownames(max2_matrix)
ordered_available <- intersect(ordered_species_ids, available_species)
other_species <- setdiff(available_species, ordered_available)
final_species_order <- c(ordered_available, other_species)
max2_matrix <- max2_matrix[final_species_order, , drop = FALSE]

# Map to common names
common_names <- ifelse(rownames(max2_matrix) %in% names(species_id_to_common),
  species_id_to_common[rownames(max2_matrix)],
  rownames(max2_matrix)
)
rownames(max2_matrix) <- common_names

# Create custom color palette (same as spliceai_validation_plots_v3.1.Rmd)
create_custom_palette <- function(n_colors_per_break = 25) {
  break1 <- colorRampPalette(c("#4B0082", "#00FFFF"))(n_colors_per_break)
  break2 <- colorRampPalette(c("#00FFFF", "#006400"))(n_colors_per_break)
  break3 <- colorRampPalette(c("#006400", "#FF6600"))(n_colors_per_break)
  break4 <- colorRampPalette(c("#FF6600", "#FF1493"))(n_colors_per_break)
  c("grey70", break1, break2, break3, break4)
}

custom_palette <- create_custom_palette(n_colors_per_break = 25)
breaks <- c(
  -1.5, -0.5,
  seq(0, 0.1, length.out = 26)[-26],
  seq(0.1, 0.3, length.out = 26)[-1],
  seq(0.3, 0.7, length.out = 26)[-1],
  seq(0.7, 1.0, length.out = 26)[-1]
)

# Create temporary heatmap to get column order from clustering
p_max2_temp <- pheatmap(
  max2_matrix,
  color = custom_palette,
  breaks = breaks,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  show_rownames = FALSE,
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  silent = TRUE
)

# Extract column order from dendrogram
col_order <- colnames(max2_matrix)[p_max2_temp$tree_col$order]

cat("\nColumn order determined from max2 clustering:\n")
cat("  Number of decoyIDs:", length(col_order), "\n")

# Reorder matrix to match column order
max2_matrix <- max2_matrix[, col_order, drop = FALSE]

# Create binned HNRNPH1 annotation (200 bins)
n_bins <- 200
n_cols <- ncol(max2_matrix)
bin_size <- ceiling(n_cols / n_bins)

# Find which columns contain HNRNPH1
hnrnph1_cols <- which(grepl("HNRNPH1", colnames(max2_matrix), ignore.case = TRUE))
cat("  HNRNPH1-containing columns found:", length(hnrnph1_cols), "\n")

# Create bin assignments for each column
col_bins <- floor((seq_len(n_cols) - 1) / bin_size) + 1
col_bins <- pmin(col_bins, n_bins) # Ensure we don't exceed n_bins

# Determine which bins contain HNRNPH1
bins_with_hnrnph1 <- unique(col_bins[hnrnph1_cols])

# Create annotation: mark bins containing HNRNPH1, leave others as NA (won't show in legend)
hnrnph1_bin_annotation <- ifelse(col_bins %in% bins_with_hnrnph1, "hnRNPH1_179620582", NA)

cat("  Bins containing HNRNPH1:", length(bins_with_hnrnph1), "out of", n_bins, "bins\n")
cat("  Bin size:", bin_size, "columns per bin\n")

# Prepare phyloP annotations
# Get all decoyIDs from the heatmap
all_decoyIDs <- colnames(max2_matrix)

# Merge phyloP data with decoyIDs from the heatmap
phylop_annotation_data <- phylop_decoy_v3 %>%
  select(decoyID, n_sites_ge_300, fraction_sites_ge_300, sum_positive_phylop) %>%
  filter(decoyID %in% all_decoyIDs) %>%
  mutate(
    n_sites_ge_300_clean = ifelse(is.na(n_sites_ge_300) | n_sites_ge_300 <= 0, 0, n_sites_ge_300),
    fraction_sites_ge_300_clean = ifelse(is.na(fraction_sites_ge_300) | fraction_sites_ge_300 <= 0, 0, fraction_sites_ge_300),
    sum_positive_phylop_clean = ifelse(is.na(sum_positive_phylop) | sum_positive_phylop <= 0, 0, sum_positive_phylop),
    n_sites_ge_300_log = log1p(n_sites_ge_300_clean),
    sum_positive_phylop_log = log1p(sum_positive_phylop_clean)
  )

# Create full annotation data frame for all decoyIDs (fill missing with 0)
phylop_annotation_full <- data.frame(
  decoyID = all_decoyIDs,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>%
  left_join(phylop_annotation_data, by = "decoyID") %>%
  mutate(
    n_sites_ge_300_log = ifelse(is.na(n_sites_ge_300_log), 0, n_sites_ge_300_log),
    fraction_sites_ge_300 = ifelse(is.na(fraction_sites_ge_300_clean), 0, fraction_sites_ge_300_clean),
    sum_positive_phylop_log = ifelse(is.na(sum_positive_phylop_log), 0, sum_positive_phylop_log)
  ) %>%
  select(decoyID, n_sites_ge_300_log, fraction_sites_ge_300, sum_positive_phylop_log)

# Set row names
rownames(phylop_annotation_full) <- phylop_annotation_full$decoyID
phylop_annotation_full$decoyID <- NULL

cat("\nphyloP annotation prepared:\n")
cat("  DecoyIDs with phyloP data:", sum(phylop_annotation_full$n_sites_ge_300_log > 0), "/", nrow(phylop_annotation_full), "\n")
cat("  n_sites_ge_300_log range:", min(phylop_annotation_full$n_sites_ge_300_log), "to", max(phylop_annotation_full$n_sites_ge_300_log), "\n")
cat("  fraction_sites_ge_300 range:", min(phylop_annotation_full$fraction_sites_ge_300), "to", max(phylop_annotation_full$fraction_sites_ge_300), "\n")

# Create column annotation combining binned HNRNPH1 and phyloP data
annotation_col <- data.frame(
  hnRNPH1_179620582 = hnrnph1_bin_annotation,
  n_sites_ge_300_log = phylop_annotation_full$n_sites_ge_300_log,
  fraction_sites_ge_300 = phylop_annotation_full$fraction_sites_ge_300,
  row.names = colnames(max2_matrix)
)
ann_colors <- list(
  hnRNPH1_179620582 = c("hnRNPH1_179620582" = "red"),
  n_sites_ge_300_log = viridis(100),
  fraction_sites_ge_300 = viridis(100)
)
```

```{r heatmap-max2}
# Create max2 heatmap
pheatmap(
  max2_matrix,
  color = custom_palette,
  breaks = breaks,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE, # Use pre-determined column order
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  annotation_col = annotation_col,
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  annotation_legend = TRUE,
  main = "Heatmap of max2 (Secondary SpliceAI Scores) - Species Ordered by Newick Tree",
  fontsize_row = 8,
  fontsize_col = 6,
  border_color = NA,
  na_col = "grey70",
  legend_breaks = c(-1, 0, 0.1, 0.3, 0.7, 1.0),
  legend_labels = c("Missing", "0.0", "0.1", "0.3", "0.7", "1.0")
)
```

```{r heatmap-max1}
# Prepare max1 matrix
max1_matrix_data <- all_data_valid %>%
  filter(!is.na(max1)) %>%
  select(decoyID, species, max1) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = decoyID, values_from = max1)

max1_matrix <- as.matrix(max1_matrix_data[, -1])
rownames(max1_matrix) <- max1_matrix_data$species
max1_matrix[is.na(max1_matrix)] <- -1

# Use same species and column order as max2
max1_matrix <- max1_matrix[final_species_order, , drop = FALSE]
common_cols <- intersect(col_order, colnames(max1_matrix))
max1_matrix <- max1_matrix[, common_cols, drop = FALSE]

common_names_max1 <- ifelse(rownames(max1_matrix) %in% names(species_id_to_common),
  species_id_to_common[rownames(max1_matrix)],
  rownames(max1_matrix)
)
rownames(max1_matrix) <- common_names_max1

# Reorder annotation to match max1 matrix columns
annotation_col_max1 <- annotation_col[common_cols, , drop = FALSE]

# Create max1 heatmap
pheatmap(
  max1_matrix,
  color = custom_palette,
  breaks = breaks,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE, # Use same column order as max2
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  annotation_col = annotation_col_max1,
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  annotation_legend = TRUE,
  main = "Heatmap of max1 (Primary SpliceAI Scores) - Species Ordered by Newick Tree",
  fontsize_row = 8,
  fontsize_col = 6,
  border_color = NA,
  na_col = "grey70",
  legend_breaks = c(-1, 0, 0.1, 0.3, 0.7, 1.0),
  legend_labels = c("Missing", "0.0", "0.1", "0.3", "0.7", "1.0")
)
```

## SpliceAI Heatmaps Ordered by phyloP fraction_sites_ge_300

```{r spliceai-heatmaps-phylop-order-setup}
# Convert phyloP annotation back to data frame with decoyID column for sorting
phylop_annotation_for_sort <- data.frame(
  decoyID = rownames(phylop_annotation_full),
  fraction_sites_ge_300 = phylop_annotation_full$fraction_sites_ge_300,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Sort phyloP annotation by fraction_sites_ge_300 (descending order)
phylop_sorted <- phylop_annotation_for_sort %>%
  arrange(desc(fraction_sites_ge_300))

# Get column order based on phyloP sorting
col_order_phylop <- phylop_sorted$decoyID

cat("\nColumn order determined from phyloP fraction_sites_ge_300 sorting:\n")
cat("  Number of decoyIDs:", length(col_order_phylop), "\n")
cat("  fraction_sites_ge_300 range:", min(phylop_sorted$fraction_sites_ge_300), "to", max(phylop_sorted$fraction_sites_ge_300), "\n")

# Reorder max2 matrix to match phyloP order (only include columns that exist in both)
common_cols_phylop_max2 <- intersect(col_order_phylop, colnames(max2_matrix))
max2_matrix_phylop <- max2_matrix[, common_cols_phylop_max2, drop = FALSE]

cat("\nMax2 matrix reordered:\n")
cat("  Columns in phyloP-sorted matrix:", ncol(max2_matrix_phylop), "\n")

# Regenerate HNRNPH1 annotation buckets for phyloP-sorted order
n_bins_phylop <- 200
n_cols_phylop <- ncol(max2_matrix_phylop)
bin_size_phylop <- ceiling(n_cols_phylop / n_bins_phylop)

# Find which columns contain HNRNPH1 in the phyloP-sorted matrix
hnrnph1_cols_phylop <- which(grepl("HNRNPH1", colnames(max2_matrix_phylop), ignore.case = TRUE))
cat("  HNRNPH1-containing columns found:", length(hnrnph1_cols_phylop), "\n")

# Create bin assignments for each column in phyloP-sorted order
col_bins_phylop <- floor((seq_len(n_cols_phylop) - 1) / bin_size_phylop) + 1
col_bins_phylop <- pmin(col_bins_phylop, n_bins_phylop) # Ensure we don't exceed n_bins

# Determine which bins contain HNRNPH1
bins_with_hnrnph1_phylop <- unique(col_bins_phylop[hnrnph1_cols_phylop])

# Create annotation: mark bins containing HNRNPH1, leave others as NA
hnrnph1_bin_annotation_phylop <- ifelse(col_bins_phylop %in% bins_with_hnrnph1_phylop, "hnRNPH1_179620582", NA)

cat("  Bins containing HNRNPH1:", length(bins_with_hnrnph1_phylop), "out of", n_bins_phylop, "bins\n")
cat("  Bin size:", bin_size_phylop, "columns per bin\n")

# Get phyloP annotation for phyloP-sorted columns
phylop_annotation_phylop <- phylop_annotation_full[common_cols_phylop_max2, , drop = FALSE]

# Create column annotation combining regenerated binned HNRNPH1 and phyloP data
annotation_col_phylop <- data.frame(
  hnRNPH1_179620582 = hnrnph1_bin_annotation_phylop,
  n_sites_ge_300_log = phylop_annotation_phylop$n_sites_ge_300_log,
  fraction_sites_ge_300 = phylop_annotation_phylop$fraction_sites_ge_300,
  row.names = colnames(max2_matrix_phylop)
)
```

```{r heatmap-max2-phylop-order}
# Create max2 heatmap ordered by phyloP fraction_sites_ge_300
pheatmap(
  max2_matrix_phylop,
  color = custom_palette,
  breaks = breaks,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE, # Use phyloP-sorted column order
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  annotation_col = annotation_col_phylop,
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  annotation_legend = TRUE,
  main = "Heatmap of max2 (Secondary SpliceAI Scores) - Ordered by phyloP fraction_sites_ge_300",
  fontsize_row = 8,
  fontsize_col = 6,
  border_color = NA,
  na_col = "grey70",
  legend_breaks = c(-1, 0, 0.1, 0.3, 0.7, 1.0),
  legend_labels = c("Missing", "0.0", "0.1", "0.3", "0.7", "1.0")
)
```

```{r heatmap-max1-phylop-order}
# Reorder max1 matrix to match phyloP order (use same columns as max2)
common_cols_phylop_max1 <- intersect(common_cols_phylop_max2, colnames(max1_matrix))
max1_matrix_phylop <- max1_matrix[, common_cols_phylop_max1, drop = FALSE]

# Use regenerated annotation for max1 (subset to columns that exist in max1)
annotation_col_max1_phylop <- annotation_col_phylop[common_cols_phylop_max1, , drop = FALSE]

cat("\nMax1 matrix reordered:\n")
cat("  Columns in phyloP-sorted matrix:", ncol(max1_matrix_phylop), "\n")

# Create max1 heatmap ordered by phyloP fraction_sites_ge_300
pheatmap(
  max1_matrix_phylop,
  color = custom_palette,
  breaks = breaks,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE, # Use phyloP-sorted column order
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  annotation_col = annotation_col_max1_phylop,
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  annotation_legend = TRUE,
  main = "Heatmap of max1 (Primary SpliceAI Scores) - Ordered by phyloP fraction_sites_ge_300",
  fontsize_row = 8,
  fontsize_col = 6,
  border_color = NA,
  na_col = "grey70",
  legend_breaks = c(-1, 0, 0.1, 0.3, 0.7, 1.0),
  legend_labels = c("Missing", "0.0", "0.1", "0.3", "0.7", "1.0")
)
```

```{r heatmap-diff-from-hg38}
# Get hg38 values for each decoy ID
hg38_data <- all_data_valid %>%
  filter(species == "hg38") %>%
  select(decoyID, max1_hg38 = max1, max2_hg38 = max2)

cat("\nHG38 reference data:\n")
cat("  Number of decoy IDs in hg38:", nrow(hg38_data), "\n")

# Calculate differences from hg38 for all species
all_data_with_hg38 <- all_data_valid %>%
  left_join(hg38_data, by = "decoyID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(max1_hg38) & !is.na(max2_hg38)) %>%
  mutate(
    max1_diff = max1 - max1_hg38,
    max2_diff = max2 - max2_hg38
  )

cat("\nData points with hg38 reference:\n")
cat("  Total data points:", nrow(all_data_with_hg38), "\n")
cat("  Unique decoy IDs:", length(unique(all_data_with_hg38$decoyID)), "\n")
cat("  Unique species:", length(unique(all_data_with_hg38$species)), "\n")

# Prepare max2 difference matrix
max2_diff_matrix_data <- all_data_with_hg38 %>%
  select(decoyID, species, max2_diff) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = decoyID, values_from = max2_diff)

max2_diff_matrix <- as.matrix(max2_diff_matrix_data[, -1])
rownames(max2_diff_matrix) <- max2_diff_matrix_data$species
max2_diff_matrix[is.na(max2_diff_matrix)] <- -999

# Reorder rows (species) to match Newick order
max2_diff_matrix <- max2_diff_matrix[final_species_order, , drop = FALSE]

# Map species IDs to common names
common_names_diff2 <- ifelse(rownames(max2_diff_matrix) %in% names(species_id_to_common),
  species_id_to_common[rownames(max2_diff_matrix)],
  rownames(max2_diff_matrix)
)
rownames(max2_diff_matrix) <- common_names_diff2

# Apply the same column order from the first two heatmaps
common_decoyIDs_diff <- intersect(col_order, colnames(max2_diff_matrix))
max2_diff_matrix <- max2_diff_matrix[, common_decoyIDs_diff, drop = FALSE]

# Prepare phyloP annotations for difference heatmaps
phylop_annotation_diff <- annotation_col[common_decoyIDs_diff, , drop = FALSE]

# Prepare max1 difference matrix
max1_diff_matrix_data <- all_data_with_hg38 %>%
  select(decoyID, species, max1_diff) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = decoyID, values_from = max1_diff)

max1_diff_matrix <- as.matrix(max1_diff_matrix_data[, -1])
rownames(max1_diff_matrix) <- max1_diff_matrix_data$species
max1_diff_matrix[is.na(max1_diff_matrix)] <- -999

# Reorder rows (species) to match Newick order
max1_diff_matrix <- max1_diff_matrix[final_species_order, , drop = FALSE]

# Map species IDs to common names
common_names_diff1 <- ifelse(rownames(max1_diff_matrix) %in% names(species_id_to_common),
  species_id_to_common[rownames(max1_diff_matrix)],
  rownames(max1_diff_matrix)
)
rownames(max1_diff_matrix) <- common_names_diff1

# Apply the same column order
max1_diff_matrix <- max1_diff_matrix[, common_decoyIDs_diff, drop = FALSE]

# Create color palettes with viridis
n_colors_diff <- 100
color_gradient_diff <- c("grey70", viridis(n_colors_diff))

# Calculate breaks for difference matrices (centered around 0)
max1_diff_range <- range(max1_diff_matrix[max1_diff_matrix != -999], na.rm = TRUE)
max2_diff_range <- range(max2_diff_matrix[max2_diff_matrix != -999], na.rm = TRUE)

# Use symmetric range around 0
max1_diff_abs <- max(abs(max1_diff_range))
max2_diff_abs <- max(abs(max2_diff_range))

breaks_max1_diff <- c(-1000, seq(-max1_diff_abs, max1_diff_abs, length.out = n_colors_diff + 1))
breaks_max2_diff <- c(-1000, seq(-max2_diff_abs, max2_diff_abs, length.out = n_colors_diff + 1))

# Create max2 difference heatmap FIRST (to match order of first two heatmaps)
pheatmap(
  max2_diff_matrix,
  color = color_gradient_diff,
  breaks = breaks_max2_diff,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE, # Use same column order as first two heatmaps
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  annotation_col = phylop_annotation_diff,
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  annotation_legend = TRUE,
  main = "Heatmap of max2 Differences from hg38 - Species Ordered by Newick Tree",
  fontsize_row = 8,
  fontsize_col = 6,
  border_color = NA,
  na_col = "grey70",
  legend_breaks = c(-999, -max2_diff_abs, -max2_diff_abs / 2, 0, max2_diff_abs / 2, max2_diff_abs),
  legend_labels = c("Missing", sprintf("%.2f", -max2_diff_abs), sprintf("%.2f", -max2_diff_abs / 2), "0", sprintf("%.2f", max2_diff_abs / 2), sprintf("%.2f", max2_diff_abs))
)

# Create max1 difference heatmap SECOND (with same column order as max2 difference)
pheatmap(
  max1_diff_matrix,
  color = color_gradient_diff,
  breaks = breaks_max1_diff,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE, # Use same column order as max2 difference (and first two heatmaps)
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  annotation_col = phylop_annotation_diff,
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  annotation_legend = TRUE,
  main = "Heatmap of max1 Differences from hg38 - Species Ordered by Newick Tree",
  fontsize_row = 8,
  fontsize_col = 6,
  border_color = NA,
  na_col = "grey70",
  legend_breaks = c(-999, -max1_diff_abs, -max1_diff_abs / 2, 0, max1_diff_abs / 2, max1_diff_abs),
  legend_labels = c("Missing", sprintf("%.2f", -max1_diff_abs), sprintf("%.2f", -max1_diff_abs / 2), "0", sprintf("%.2f", max1_diff_abs / 2), sprintf("%.2f", max1_diff_abs))
)
```

## Extract Last 6 Bins from Heatmap

```{r extract-last-6-bins}
# Extract columns from the last 6 bins (bins 195-200)
last_6_bins <- 195:200
cols_in_last_6_bins <- which(col_bins %in% last_6_bins)

cat("\n=== Extracting Last 6 Bins (195-200) ===\n")
cat("  Total columns in last 6 bins:", length(cols_in_last_6_bins), "\n")
cat("  Bin range:", min(col_bins[cols_in_last_6_bins]), "-", max(col_bins[cols_in_last_6_bins]), "\n")

# Get decoyIDs in last 6 bins
decoyIDs_last_6_bins <- colnames(max2_matrix)[cols_in_last_6_bins]

# Extract data for these decoyIDs from all_data_valid
last_6_bins_data <- all_data_valid %>%
  filter(decoyID %in% decoyIDs_last_6_bins) %>%
  select(decoyID, species, max1, pos1, max2, pos2, d)

# Add bin information
bin_info <- data.frame(
  decoyID = colnames(max2_matrix),
  bin = col_bins,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

last_6_bins_data <- last_6_bins_data %>%
  left_join(bin_info, by = "decoyID")

# Save to TSV
output_file_last6bins <- "../results/splice_out_v3.1/last_6_bins_heatmap_data.tsv"
write.table(last_6_bins_data,
  file = output_file_last6bins, sep = "\t",
  row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE
)

cat("\nSaved last 6 bins data to:", output_file_last6bins, "\n")
cat("  Rows:", nrow(last_6_bins_data), "\n")
cat("  Unique decoyIDs:", length(unique(last_6_bins_data$decoyID)), "\n")
cat("  Unique species:", length(unique(last_6_bins_data$species)), "\n")
```

## Calculate Mean Intron Retention per Intron

```{r calculate-mean-psi}
# Calculate mean PSI (intron retention) across all samples for each intron
psi_cols_final <- setdiff(
  colnames(PSI_table_filtered),
  c(
    "GENE", "EVENT", "COORD", "LENGTH", "FullCO", "COMPLEX",
    "chr", "start", "end"
  )
)

PSI_table_filtered$mean_PSI <- rowMeans(PSI_table_filtered[, ..psi_cols_final], na.rm = TRUE)
PSI_table_filtered$median_PSI <- apply(PSI_table_filtered[, ..psi_cols_final], 1, median, na.rm = TRUE)
```

## Overlap phyloP Sites with Introns

```{r overlap-phylop-introns}
# Merge phyloP data with decoy coordinates
phylop_with_coords <- merge(
  phylop_decoy_v3,
  decoy_coords[, .(decoyID, chr, start, end, strand)],
  by = "decoyID",
  all.x = TRUE
)

cat("phyloP sites with coordinates:", sum(!is.na(phylop_with_coords$chr)), "/", nrow(phylop_with_coords), "\n")

# Create GRanges object for phyloP sites
phylop_gr <- GRanges(
  seqnames = phylop_with_coords$chr,
  ranges = IRanges(start = phylop_with_coords$start, end = phylop_with_coords$end),
  decoyID = phylop_with_coords$decoyID,
  n_sites_ge_300 = phylop_with_coords$n_sites_ge_300,
  fraction_sites_ge_300 = phylop_with_coords$fraction_sites_ge_300,
  sum_positive_phylop = phylop_with_coords$sum_positive_phylop,
  mean_phylop = phylop_with_coords$mean_phylop
)

# Find overlaps between phyloP sites and introns
overlaps <- findOverlaps(phylop_gr, intron_gr, ignore.strand = TRUE)

# Create a data frame with matched phyloP and intron retention data
matched_data <- data.frame(
  decoyID = phylop_gr$decoyID[queryHits(overlaps)],
  n_sites_ge_300 = phylop_gr$n_sites_ge_300[queryHits(overlaps)],
  fraction_sites_ge_300 = phylop_gr$fraction_sites_ge_300[queryHits(overlaps)],
  sum_positive_phylop = phylop_gr$sum_positive_phylop[queryHits(overlaps)],
  mean_phylop = phylop_gr$mean_phylop[queryHits(overlaps)],
  EVENT = intron_gr$EVENT[subjectHits(overlaps)],
  GENE = intron_gr$GENE[subjectHits(overlaps)],
  intron_idx = subjectHits(overlaps)
)

# Add intron retention values
matched_data$mean_PSI <- PSI_table_filtered$mean_PSI[matched_data$intron_idx]
matched_data$median_PSI <- PSI_table_filtered$median_PSI[matched_data$intron_idx]

# Calculate intron length from PSI table
matched_data$intron_length <- PSI_table_filtered$LENGTH[matched_data$intron_idx]

cat("Number of phyloP sites overlapping introns (before filtering):", nrow(matched_data), "\n")

# If a decoy overlaps multiple introns, select the one with the shortest length
matched_data <- matched_data %>%
  arrange(decoyID, intron_length) %>%
  distinct(decoyID, .keep_all = TRUE)

# Remove rows with missing data
matched_data <- matched_data[complete.cases(matched_data[, c("n_sites_ge_300", "fraction_sites_ge_300", "mean_PSI")]), ]

cat("Number of phyloP sites overlapping introns (after selecting shortest):", nrow(matched_data), "\n")
cat("Number of unique introns with phyloP data:", length(unique(matched_data$intron_idx)), "\n")
```

## Correlation Analysis: phyloP Conservation (n_sites_ge_300) vs Intron Retention

```{r correlation-phylop-300-psi}
# Calculate correlations
cor_n_sites_300_psi <- cor(matched_data$n_sites_ge_300,
  matched_data$mean_PSI,
  use = "complete.obs"
)
cor_fraction_300_psi <- cor(matched_data$fraction_sites_ge_300,
  matched_data$mean_PSI,
  use = "complete.obs"
)

cat("\n=== Correlation: phyloP Conservation (>= 300) vs Intron Retention ===\n")
cat("n_sites_ge_300 vs mean_PSI:", round(cor_n_sites_300_psi, 4), "\n")
cat("fraction_sites_ge_300 vs mean_PSI:", round(cor_fraction_300_psi, 4), "\n")

# Plot correlation: n_sites_ge_300 vs PSI
p_300_psi <- ggplot(matched_data, aes(x = n_sites_ge_300, y = mean_PSI)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "#E31A1C") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#E31A1C", fill = "#E31A1C") +
  labs(
    title = "phyloP Conservation (n_sites >= 300) vs Intron Retention",
    subtitle = paste0("Correlation = ", round(cor_n_sites_300_psi, 4)),
    x = "Number of Sites with phyloP >= 300",
    y = "Mean PSI (Intron Retention)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(p_300_psi)

# Plot correlation: fraction_sites_ge_300 vs PSI
p_fraction_300_psi <- ggplot(matched_data, aes(x = fraction_sites_ge_300, y = mean_PSI)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "#1F78B4") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#1F78B4", fill = "#1F78B4") +
  labs(
    title = "phyloP Conservation (Fraction Sites >= 300) vs Intron Retention",
    subtitle = paste0("Correlation = ", round(cor_fraction_300_psi, 4)),
    x = "Fraction of Sites with phyloP >= 300",
    y = "Mean PSI (Intron Retention)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(p_fraction_300_psi)
```

## Correlation Analysis: phyloP Conservation vs Sequence Length

```{r correlation-phylop-length}
# Calculate correlations
cor_n_sites_300_length <- cor(matched_data$n_sites_ge_300,
  matched_data$intron_length,
  use = "complete.obs"
)
cor_fraction_300_length <- cor(matched_data$fraction_sites_ge_300,
  matched_data$intron_length,
  use = "complete.obs"
)

cat("\n=== Correlation: phyloP Conservation vs Sequence Length ===\n")
cat("n_sites_ge_300 vs intron_length:", round(cor_n_sites_300_length, 4), "\n")
cat("fraction_sites_ge_300 vs intron_length:", round(cor_fraction_300_length, 4), "\n")

# Plot correlation: n_sites_ge_300 vs intron_length
p_300_length <- ggplot(matched_data, aes(x = intron_length, y = n_sites_ge_300)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "#33A02C") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#33A02C", fill = "#33A02C") +
  labs(
    title = "phyloP Conservation (n_sites >= 300) vs Intron Length",
    subtitle = paste0("Correlation = ", round(cor_n_sites_300_length, 4)),
    x = "Intron Length (bp)",
    y = "Number of Sites with phyloP >= 300"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(p_300_length)

# Plot correlation: fraction_sites_ge_300 vs intron_length
p_fraction_300_length <- ggplot(matched_data, aes(x = intron_length, y = fraction_sites_ge_300)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "#FF7F00") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#FF7F00", fill = "#FF7F00") +
  labs(
    title = "phyloP Conservation (Fraction Sites >= 300) vs Intron Length",
    subtitle = paste0("Correlation = ", round(cor_fraction_300_length, 4)),
    x = "Intron Length (bp)",
    y = "Fraction of Sites with phyloP >= 300"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(p_fraction_300_length)
```

## Prepare Data for Logistic Regression

```{r prepare-logistic-data}
# Aggregate phyloP scores per intron (take mean of overlapping sites)
intron_phylop <- matched_data %>%
  group_by(intron_idx) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_n_sites_ge_300 = mean(n_sites_ge_300, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_fraction_sites_ge_300 = mean(fraction_sites_ge_300, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_phylop_sites = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Merge with intron retention data
regression_data <- PSI_table_filtered %>%
  mutate(intron_idx = row_number()) %>%
  left_join(intron_phylop, by = "intron_idx") %>%
  filter(!is.na(mean_n_sites_ge_300)) # Only keep introns with phyloP data

# Create binary outcome variable: PSI > 10 = retained (1), PSI <= 10 = not retained (0)
regression_data$retained_10 <- ifelse(regression_data$mean_PSI > 10, 1, 0)

cat("PSI Threshold > 10:\n")
cat("  Retained (>10 PSI):", sum(regression_data$retained_10 == 1), "\n")
cat("  Not retained (<=10 PSI):", sum(regression_data$retained_10 == 0), "\n")
cat("Total introns with phyloP data:", nrow(regression_data), "\n")
```

## Logistic Regression: PSI > 10

```{r logistic-regression-psi10}
# Model 1: Using n_sites_ge_300 as predictor
model1 <- glm(retained_10 ~ mean_n_sites_ge_300,
  data = regression_data,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

cat("\n=== Model 1: PSI > 10 ~ n_sites_ge_300 ===\n")
summary(model1)

model1_summary <- tidy(model1, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
print(model1_summary)

# Model 2: Using fraction_sites_ge_300 as predictor
model2 <- glm(retained_10 ~ mean_fraction_sites_ge_300,
  data = regression_data,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

cat("\n=== Model 2: PSI > 10 ~ fraction_sites_ge_300 ===\n")
summary(model2)

model2_summary <- tidy(model2, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
print(model2_summary)

# Visualize model predictions
regression_data$predicted_prob_n_sites <- predict(model1, type = "response")
regression_data$predicted_prob_fraction <- predict(model2, type = "response")

p_n_sites <- ggplot(regression_data, aes(x = mean_n_sites_ge_300, y = retained_10)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, position = position_jitter(height = 0.05)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = predicted_prob_n_sites), color = "blue", size = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Logistic Regression: n_sites_ge_300 Predicting Intron Retention (PSI > 10)",
    x = "Mean Number of Sites with phyloP >= 300",
    y = "Intron Retained (1 if PSI > 10, 0 if PSI <= 10)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(p_n_sites)

p_fraction <- ggplot(regression_data, aes(x = mean_fraction_sites_ge_300, y = retained_10)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, position = position_jitter(height = 0.05)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = predicted_prob_fraction), color = "green", size = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Logistic Regression: fraction_sites_ge_300 Predicting Intron Retention (PSI > 10)",
    x = "Mean Fraction of Sites with phyloP >= 300",
    y = "Intron Retained (1 if PSI > 10, 0 if PSI <= 10)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(p_fraction)
```
